# QuickLobby

> The fastest anonymous Valorant lobby finder. Create or join a lobby in seconds — no account required.

QuickLobby is a free, real-time web app for finding Valorant teammates. No login, no Discord, no personal data collected.

## Features

- **Instant Lobbies**: Create a lobby in seconds with your party code
- **100% Anonymous**: No account, no sign-up, no personal data
- **Auto-Expiring**: Lobbies expire after 15 minutes (extendable up to 3 times)
- **All Regions**: NA, EU, AP, KR, BR, LATAM, MENA, OCE
- **All Modes**: Competitive, Unrated, Spike Rush, Deathmatch, Swiftplay, Escalation, Replication
- **All Ranks**: Iron through Radiant, or Any
- **Real-Time**: Live lobby feed with no page refresh needed
- **Safe**: Profanity filter, report system, automatic moderation

## Pages

- Home: https://quicklobby.app/
- Find Lobby: https://quicklobby.app/find-lobby
- Create Lobby: https://quicklobby.app/create-lobby
- About: https://quicklobby.app/about
- Terms: https://quicklobby.app/terms
- Privacy: https://quicklobby.app/privacy
- Support: https://quicklobby.app/support

## How It Works

1. Create a lobby with your Valorant party code
2. Set your region, game mode, rank range, and preferences
3. Other players find your lobby in the live feed
4. They copy your party code and join in Valorant
5. Lobby auto-expires after 15 minutes

## Technical Details

- Built with React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS
- Real-time backend powered by Convex
- No user accounts or authentication required
- All data auto-deletes after expiry
- GDPR compliant — minimal data collection
